title: GT4 Reimagined
body:
GT4 Reimagined is my take on what gregtech 4 might have been if Greg didn't go the entire gt5 route but still dropped ic2. Many things will still be the same as they wre in gt4, but some things like tools and cables will be more like gt5 since this is completely independent of ic2. there is also more gt5 like ore processing, and a couple machines recipes have changed. A couple machines have also been added. Crrently this mod is still very wip, this being the major things left:

- Some covers
- Automation blocks
- Oil world generation
- Solar/Wind/Water generators
- Pump
- Large heat exchanger
- Fusion
- Fission


 
This project is in very early alpha, so things may break and/or change

REQUIRES AntimatterAPI: 
https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/antimatterapi

If you have any questions you can ask in their gt server here: https://discord.gg/9kM4bRj or my discord here: https://discord.gg/UVSD2VQpvS
